description_long: This research institute building features a large, rectangular footprint with a predominantly dark green exterior, likely representing a flat roof and landscaped surroundings. At the center, there is a raised, lighter-colored section with a grid-like pattern, possibly indicating a main building block or laboratory area. Smaller structures and geometric elements are visible on the roof, suggesting rooftop equipment or utility installations. The building appears to be set into a base platform, which may represent the surrounding grounds or a stylized site plan. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functional layout. The structure is low-rise and expansive, typical of institutional research facilities.
description: A sprawling, low-rise research institute with a dark green exterior, central raised section, and rooftop utility features. The design is functional and modern, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: The main rectangular form and central raised section are visible, along with rooftop equipment and the broad, flat roof.
description_view_1: The central section is more prominent, with visible lighter elements and a clear view of the building's depth.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the building shows the flat roof and the central block, with rooftop features less pronounced.
description_view_3: The central raised section and rooftop details are visible from a different angle, highlighting the building's symmetry.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway is not clearly visible, but appears to be integrated into the central raised section, likely featuring standard double doors, possibly glass or metal, with minimal decorative elements and accessible via a flat approach.
